narrative:
Columbiana Ex Vill Sd (Columbiana) exempted village school district has 5,972 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.7%, a clear Republican lean of 11.3 percentage points.
